self_incrimination_gordon_180x.description: Gordon publicly claimed $SWIF among 'my 3 best trades of the year' (180x), explicitly admitting financial interest
self_incrimination_gordon_180x.evidence_text_quote: My 3 best trades of the year so far: Butthole: $100k-$140M (1400X), $FAT $300K to $26M (85X), $SWIF $160K to $30M (180X). But the trenches are hungry for more! Shall I find another HUGE runner?
self_incrimination_gordon_180x.criticality: P0 — explicit financial interest admission, contradicts later 'just helping followers' narrative

self_incrimination_don_called_swif.description: Don publicly admitted having 'called' $SWIF among other tokens (auto-promotion of track record)
self_incrimination_don_called_swif.evidence_text_quote: when I make a conviction call and you see me bull posting about a project, just know it will do big numbers. $TROLL $URANUS #DOLLARCOIN $BOSS $SWIF. I called all sub $1M MCAP, they went between $4M MCAP - $300M MCAP. Diamond hands always rewarded
self_incrimination_don_called_swif.criticality: P0 — explicit admission of shilling role + lists 4 OTHER tokens to investigate for same pattern

fake_blackrock_endorsement.description: Gordon repeatedly claimed 'Alex from Blackrock' was burning $SWIF supply — fake institutional endorsement (same pattern as fake Bullish Degen ETF on $BULLISH)
fake_blackrock_endorsement.tweet_sep_3_text: Alex from Blackrock just burned another 1M of $SWIF tokens
fake_blackrock_endorsement.tweet_sep_14_text: I heard from Alex (he's high up at Blackrock) they are burning another 1% of $SWIF supply next week
fake_blackrock_endorsement.tweet_sep_15_text: wtf?! Alex from Blackrock has just burned another 16.5M $SWIF tokens. He has burned over 12% ($500k) by himself. Supply shock incoming?
fake_blackrock_endorsement.legal_qualification_fr: Manipulation de marche par diffusion d'informations fausses (art. L. 465-3-1 CMF) + Usurpation d'identite institutionnelle (BlackRock) + Delit d'initie simule
fake_blackrock_endorsement.verification_needed: Vérifier ownership/control des 2 wallets G17y1n... et HgAV13... — probablement cluster-controlled

post_incident_defense_coordination.description: After 12 Aug incident, Don publicly defended Gordon, JayXBT claimed innocence with same catchphrase, dodic+momma supported — coordinated defense network
post_incident_defense_coordination.don_defense_text: $SWIF will /reverse. you can't blame @gordongekko for what happened, I can assure you it was not him, he is a trench warrior who is actually helping his followers get out of the trenches. Every chaos there is opportunity
post_incident_defense_coordination.jxbt_defense_text: Everything is provable on chain and everyone will find me and Gordon innocent. Every chaos there is opportunity, the hat stays on. Lets run it up!
